text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm hm hmm. ♪ It's bath time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Ayabe! What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Your hairband... it was on my bed. Try not to leave it in random
places.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Did I drop it? I didn't even realize it was gone. Thanks! ♪ I
would've been dripping water everywhere after my bath!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Since you're here and all, wanna take a bath too?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know you're a shower girlie, but tryouts are almost here, right? So a
niiice warm and relaxing bath would be perfect, if you ask me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh... Hm, too bad I guess.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I don't get her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Maybe... we would've been like that too. If... if you were here...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Would you have... tried to spend time with me too?

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text:
"You know those two stars? They made a wish to the gods, and that's
why they're together forever."

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text:
"Hehe... If I become a star one day too, do you think I'll be with you
forever?"

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Before I even had the words to describe it, I would sometimes get this
feeling that someone was beside me—close enough to touch, yet
hopelessly far away.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I looked up at that red star, the feeling got stronger. So
from a young age, I would sit beneath the starry sky and talk to that
someone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: When my mother saw me... she would often force a pained smile.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hrmm... Nnnghhh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You're not going to be able to get up tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know, I know, but I just can't fall asleep. You don't have nights like
that?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I do, but for different reasons.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Hey, since we're insomnia buddies tonight, why don't we chat
about stuff?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No. Go to bed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! You're just gonna leave me hanging, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Quiet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: No! Never! Join my gossip sesh right now, or I'll sneak into your bed!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't do that... Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We can chat... about what, though?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Okay, okay, we'll go with a classic...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Your first time running! I wanna hear all about your memories! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: My first time...

text_block_list.name: Race Organizer
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! I know all about your achievements—which is precisely why I'd love to see your daughter in the Pony Cup!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Well, I...
Ayabe, what do you—

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: YES!

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, yes! I... I want to run! I need to run!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I remember it clear as day. I was always the quiet one, so it was like
someone else entirely had blurted out that "yes"... My mother was
shocked, to say the least.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The Pony Cup! Hehe. So that was your first race!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
How was it, getting a taste of running? What did you feel in the
moment?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...
I felt...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The turf... its exhilarating scent. The wind rushing by, the euphoria of
going farther and farther.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
My heartbeat ringing like an alarm. My surroundings streaking past,
their vivid colors like shooting stars...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! S-sorry! It's just, um...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Did I sounded like someone else entirely?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: I did it! I really did it! Mom, I won! I won! Hehe... ehehe... Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... sob... Huh? How come I'm... c-crying? I can't... I can't stop!

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why... I... I had so much fun running. Tt was like... like I
wasn't me.

text_block_list.name: Young Ayabe
text_block_list.text: But now... Now I feel so... alone... and sad. Why, Mom? Wh-why?

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...The end. The dorm leader should be coming by on patrol soon.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, but Ayabe—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The end. Now sleep.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not long after the Pony Cup, my mother told me the truth.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text: Listen carefully. You actually... have a little sister.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Mother
text_block_list.text: A twin little sister... though she didn't make it into this world.
